title: HandsOfTheVoid.jar
description: Slow burn horror mod heavily inspired by the broken script that will make you feel like you're in an ARG
body:
# HandsOfTheVoid

![HandsOfTheVoid.jar logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/914d261106503e2696a50ffec2c73198a6e0ca74.png)
## WARNING
- This mod **will** damage your world
- This mod may cause epilepsy problems with some flashing imagery.
- This mod has loud noises and disturbing imagery

## Information

This horror mod is a **slow burn**, meaning it will slowly introduce new entities and elements into your world, ARG style. This mod will destroy your world and has the capacity to **destroy** bases and loot. HandsOfTheVoid.jar does work in multi-player, however there may occasionally be some errors.

Multiple entities with different behaviours will attack, haunt, or observe you. 
Structures and blocks will spawn all around you.
You will be teleported to new liminal dimensions.

Currently there is no config options for the mod

Heavily inspired by The Broken Script and Wonderland.jar

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/p-qBfCP5M08" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Lore snippets:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
An error in the source code of minecraft has facilitated the creation of a sentient hateful being with a drive to torture and kill minecraft players by trapping them inside the game

More lore details can be found in game.
A full lore timeline is currently not interpretable but as updates come it will be fully fleshed out.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SZV6l4mfWHI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

This mod would not be possible without MCreator
